business.headline: Rs 5 crore, Rs 12 crore, Rs 40 crore? What retirement means for Indians todayRs 1 crore once sounded life-changing. Today, some Indians say even Rs 10-15 crore may not guarantee retirement comfort. I spoke to families to understand what they now consider their ideal retirement corpus and why the number keeps rising.

US proposes H-1B minimum wage hike, likely to make hiring foreign workers costlierThe US Department of Labour has proposed sharply higher prevailing wages for H-1B and related visa programmes. The draft rule has drawn both support and opposition ahead of the May 26 comment deadline.

Can motor insurers reject claims for reporting accidents late?Handcrafted ByOur Editors In the fifth story in our series Motor Mess, we spoke to experts to understand why delayed accident reporting often leads to insurance claim rejections, the mistakes policyholders should avoid and what options remain if such claims are rejected.

Two inspections, one pattern: Labour off the booksIn the sixth part of this series on labour laws and Inspector Raj, multiple factory inspections conducted in 1988 expose recurring patterns of undocumented labour, hidden wage records and statutory evasion.

Petrol and diesel prices likely to be hiked before May 15Petrol and diesel prices in India are likely to be hiked before May 15 as state-run oil marketing companies face rising financial stress amid a sharp surge in global crude oil prices, sources told India Today TV.

Bringing mothers in as co-applicants: Redefining home loan ownership in IndiaFamilies are now increasingly choosing to involve mothers in building long-term financial assets and securing a stronger financial future for themselves.

From flowers to financial freedom: Rethinking Mother's DayFor years, Mother's Day has been about flowers and celebrations. But slowly, conversations are shifting towards something deeper, i.e., helping mothers build savings, investments, and financial confidence of their own.

Explained: Why SBI shares tumbled nearly 7% after Q4 resultsSBI shares fell sharply after the lender's Q4 earnings disappointed the market. The reaction underscored investor concern over treasury income, margins and earnings quality.

Sensex closes over 500 points lower as SBI tumbles nearly 7% after Q4 resultsBenchmark indices closed sharply lower on Thursday after SBI's weaker-than-expected Q4 results hit banking shares. The decline reflected caution around crude oil prices, West Asia tensions and the broader earnings season.

Sensex sinks 600 points: Why is the stock market falling today?Benchmark indices fell sharply on Thursday as higher crude prices, foreign selling and weak banking stocks hit sentiment. Investors stayed cautious ahead of key Q4 results, with traders watching US-Iran tensions and oil moves.

I broke my FD 3 times: When it helped and when it hurtA fixed deposit feels safe because it is supposed to sit quietly in the background, growing slowly over time. But when life throws sudden surprises, that safety net often becomes the first thing people reach for. The real question is, when does breaking an FD actually make sense, and when does it backfire?

Think PAN is needed only for ITR Filing? 7 transactions where you must quote itPAN has quietly become one of the most important financial documents in India today, but are you aware that many banking, investment and cash transactions cannot be completed without quoting it?

8th Pay Commission: The family unit formula behind salary revisions of govt employeesEmployee unions have urged the 8th Pay Commission to revisit the family unit formula used to fix salaries. Any revision could raise basic pay, allowances, pensions and the broader compensation bill. But what exactly is the 'family unit' formula?

Tata Trusts board meeting postponed amid Tata Sons governance, listing discussionsTata Trusts has postponed a crucial board meeting scheduled for today to May 16, as governance disputes, Tata Sons board representation, listing discussions and leadership questions continue to draw attention across corporate India.

Lenskart shares fall over 2% amid block deal buzz, IPO lock-in expiryLenskart shares fell in Thursday's trade as block deal chatter coincided with the expiry of its IPO lock-in period. The move put the spotlight on possible supply pressure even as analysts said fundamentals remain unchanged.

Sensex opens 400 points lower, Nifty slips below 24,200 as banking stocks dragThe BSE Sensex fell 422.11 points, or 0.54%, to 77,422.41 in early trade. The NSE Nifty50 slipped 129 points to 24,197.65, falling below the 24,200 mark.

Why is Maharashtra's Rs 100 Will registration move getting so much attention?Anyone who owns assets such as a flat, land, jewellery, fixed deposits, shares or mutual funds should consider making a Will. Even small savings can become the reason for family disagreements if there is no clear-written instruction from the owner.

Pronto bags fresh $20 million funding, valuation jumps to $200 millionPronto offers quick home services such as laundry, kitchen preparation and home cleaning, with services starting from Rs 125. Workers are available within 15 minutes through the platform.

Stock market ends flat as Sensex slips 114, Nifty stays above 24,300Benchmark equity indices ended little changed on Wednesday, with the Sensex slipping 114 points and the Nifty holding above 24,300. The muted session underlined investor caution over global cues, interest rate expectations and earnings momentum, while selective buying capped losses.

Can senior citizens above skip ITR filing in FY27? Here's who qualifiesFiling income tax returns every year can be stressful for many elderly taxpayers. But did you know some senior citizens above 75 may not need to file ITR in FY27 at all if certain conditions are met?

entertainment.headline: Trisha greets and hugs Vijay's mother Shoba at oath ceremony Trisha Krishnan greeted Vijay's mother, Shoba Chandrasekhar, at his swearing-in ceremony in Chennai. The exchange stood out at an event marked by Vijay's first remarks as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister and his family's emotional presence.

Anupam Kher, Sanjay Dutt to Kajol: Celebrities share Mother's Day tributes Celebrities celebrated Mother's Day by sharing sweet photos, old memories and loving messages for their mothers on social media. Anupam Kher, Sanjay Dutt, Kajol, Sunny and Bobby Deol were among the stars who commemorated the occasion.

Pawan Kalyan, Kamal Haasan, celebs congratulate Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay As Vijay took the oath as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister, several celebrities congratulated him on social media. Pawan Kalyan, Kamal Haasan and R Madhavan were among the celebrities who reacted to his big political moment.

Trisha to Jana Nayagan producer: Celebrities at Vijay's swearing-in ceremony Actor-turned-politician Vijay's swearing-in ceremony as the Tamil Nadu Chief Minister saw several film personalities in attendance. These include his Leo co-star Trisha, the producer of his upcoming film Jana Nayagan and longtime collaborators from his journey in cinema.

Kriti Sanon recalls losing films to star kids before Mimi: Beyond my control Actor Kriti Sanon said roles she nearly landed eventually went to star kids during her early years in films. Her experience reflected the uncertainty, bias and unequal treatment she faced as an outsider.

A day in the lives of Vijay fans who carried him from theatres to CM's chair A new mother with a 12-week-old baby. A doctor arrives after a 24-hour shift. A banker flies back from Ireland. Inside the everyday lives of the fans who turned their love for Vijay into political success in Tamil Nadu.

Trisha stuns in ice-blue Kanjeevaram and jasmine flowers at Vijay's oath Actor Trisha attended C Joseph Vijay's oath-taking ceremony in Chennai and said she was looking forward to the historic moment. Dressed in a blue silk Kanjeevaram saree, the actor drew attention as she arrived at Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium.

Thalapathy turf: Why Chennai's Nehru Stadium was the apt stage for Vijay's crowning Jawaharlal Nehru Indoor Stadium hosted Vijay's oath-taking as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister on May 10, 2026. The ceremony turned a fan-favourite film venue into the stage for a major political shift.

Kiara Advani recalls emotional phase after childbirth and how Sidharth stood by her Kiara Advani has spoken about the emotional shifts she experienced after childbirth and the support Sidharth Malhotra gave her. The actor-couple welcomed their first child, a daughter, in July 2025.

Rashmika Mandanna posts unseen moments from Vijay Deverakonda's birthday Rashmika Mandanna posted an Instagram birthday note for Vijay Deverakonda on May 9, with videos and pictures from the day. The post put together moments with family, friends, fans and their time at home.

Sonam Kapoor-Anand Ahuja reveal second son's name, share its meaning Sonam Kapoor and Anand Ahuja have introduced their second son on Instagram. Revealing the name, the actor said it shares a sacred Vedic connection with his elder brother Vayu.

Drishyam 3 trailer: Mystery deepens for Mohanlal in new chapter of film series The official trailer of Drishyam 3 is out, offering a fresh glimpse into the next chapter of Mohanlal's adventure as Georgekutty. It keeps major twists hidden while building suspense around the next chapter of the family saga.

Patriarchy still deeply ingrained: Kriti Sanon calls out pay disparity in industry Kriti Sanon said female leads are often asked to accept lower fees in Bollywood. She said the pattern shows how deeply industry bias and patriarchy still persist.

Avika Gor relocates to Bangkok with husband Milind Chandwani. Here's why Avika Gor has moved to Bangkok with Milind Chandwani after their marriage. In an interview, the actor opened up about the decision. She will be seen next in Khatron Ke Khiladi 15.

Tanishaa Mukerji: Intense prep for Neal 'n' Nikki look led to hormonal imbalance Tanishaa Mukerji said Aditya Chopra asked her to get toned for Neal 'n' Nikki, leading her into an intense transformation. She said the regimen caused hormonal imbalance.

Ranveer Singh clicks selfies with fans on King set in South Africa, pics go viral Ranveer Singh was seen meeting fans in South Africa while Deepika Padukone filmed King with SRK. The sightings drew attention days after a video showed him with daughter Dua on set.

Vijay Deverakonda stuns in Rowdy Janardhana poster as Keerthy Suresh takes charge The makers of Rowdy Janardhana unveiled a birthday poster showing Vijay Deverakonda and Keerthy Suresh in a striking face-off. The poster teases the film's mix of rural action and romance ahead of its December 2026 release.

Nora Fatehi to perform at FIFA World Cup 2026 opening ceremony in Canada Nora Fatehi is set to perform at the FIFA World Cup 2026 opening ceremony in Canada on June 12. The announcement marks her return to the FIFA stage as the tournament opens across three host countries.

Vijay Deverakonda waves at fans, greets them with Rashmika on 37th birthday Fans gathered outside actor Vijay Deverakonda's home for his birthday celebrations on Saturday. The actor waved at the crowd, cut a cake and was joined by his wife, actor Rashmika Mandanna.

general news.headline: White paper on DMK govt's finances, free power: Chief Minister Vijay's first movesThe first file Vijay signed approved the rollout of 200 units of free electricity for domestic consumers. Another cleared the creation of a special force dedicated to women's safety. He also okayed a proposal to set up an anti-drug unit in every district, fulfilling his promise to tackle the alleged drug menace in the state.

Explosives scare near PM's event venue on Bengaluru outskirts, suspect in custodyThe discovery comes amid heightened security arrangements for the Prime Minister's programme in Karnataka, with multiple layers of checking and surveillance deployed around the venue and surrounding areas.

Meet S Keerthana, youngest minister in Vijay's Cabinet and a fluent Hindi speakerS Keerthana, 29, created history in the recently-concluded Assembly election by becoming the first woman MLA from the Sivakasi constituency in Virudhunagar district.

Vande Mataram: Vijay does one better than BJPThe Narendra Modi government's directive on the national song in February had triggered a major political row, with Opposition parties sharply criticising the move. At today's ceremony, Vande Mataram was sung before the national anthem in the presence of Rahul Gandhi and Vijay, who shared the stage together.

Meet Vijay's new Cabinet: Ex-IRS officer, 29-year-old actor among initial picksThe list includes a 29-year-old MLA, who will become the youngest minister in the cabinet, a doctor and an ex-IRS officer, and seven other leaders. All ministers in the first list are from the TVK, with no Congress leader included.

Ebar Ram, pore Bam: How Left voters quietly helped BJP win Bengal electionOne of the crucial factors in the BJP's historic 2026 victory in West Bengal polls has been the silent Left supporters who backed it. Repelled by the TMC and lacking any viable alternative, scores of Left supporters voted for the BJP in the 2026 polls. The strategy of the CPI(M) supporters is similar to the one used by MMA fighters.

Op Sindoor showed Pak military's geography problem: It has nowhere to hideLast year, Operation Sindoor brought focus to what has been a fact - Pakistan's lack of strategic depth - and also showed how that old geographical weakness now matters in a new way.

5,000 workers would've died...: Sacked TMC neta turns on Mamata, praises SuvenduSuspended Trinamool Congress spokesperson Riju Dutta praised West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari and said he stopped retaliatory violence after his aide's killing earlier this week.

Iran can't store any more, throwing oil into sea? Is US blockade working?Satellite images near Kharg Island have raised questions about whether Iran is releasing crude into the sea as its storage fills up under the US blockade. The suspected slicks have added to concerns over environmental damage. Has the US blockade succeeded in disrupting Iranian oil exports? Here's what we know so far.

Live: Vijay quits Trichy East seat after becoming Chief MinisterThalapathy Vijay Oath Ceremony Live Updates: TVK chief Vijay took oath as Tamil Nadu's Chief Minister on Sunday at a ceremony attended by political leaders, and his supporters and family members. The support extended by Congress, CPI, CPI(M), VCK and IUML was essential in securing the Governor's nod to form the government. Congress leader Rahul Gandhi attended the ceremony, where Vijay took oath alongside eight other TVK leaders, who were sworn in as his ministers. Stay tuned to indiatoday.in for live updates.

The slow death of diesels could begin with Innova Crysta, but what will replace it?Diesel cars once defined efficiency and effortless long-distance driving in India, but tightening regulations, shrinking options and rising hybrid adoption now signal the gradual end of the diesel era.

Parasite, can dump allies anytime for gain: PM slams Congress for ditching DMKPM Modi said the Congress's "lust for power" led it to backstab the DMK despite the Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam repeatedly supporting it during crises over three decades. He added that the DMK had aided the Congress during UPA-1 and UPA-2, but was now being betrayed as political circumstances changed.

Trisha greets and hugs Vijay's mother Shoba at oath ceremonyTrisha Krishnan greeted Vijay's mother, Shoba Chandrasekhar, at his swearing-in ceremony in Chennai. The exchange stood out at an event marked by Vijay's first remarks as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister and his family's emotional presence.

NEET, NEP and Vijay: Is Tamil Nadu's education politics about to change?Handcrafted ByOur Editors For decades, Dravidian parties turned education into a battle over identity, language and state rights. But now, with Joseph Vijay taking over as Tamil Nadu's Chief Minister and TVK emerging as a major force, is Chennai's long resistance to Delhi's education policies finally beginning to soften? Let's find out.

CSK star at CM Vijay's oath ceremony in Chennai? R Ashwin joins social media banterIPL 2026: A viral lookalike of CSK pacer Anshul Kamboj at CM Vijay's oath ceremony triggered a hilarious social media intervention from R Ashwin, just hours before the Super Kings' crucial afternoon clash against Lucknow.

Iran congratulates Karoline Leavitt on baby's birth with bombed school referenceKaroline Leavitt's post announcing the birth of her daughter drew a sharp reply from the Iranian Embassy in Armenia. The embassy used the post to point to the Minab school bombing.

SpaceX stacks first Starship V3: World's tallest rocket ready for launchSpaceX has assembled the first full Starship V3 stack at Starbase, Texas, marking a historic milestone in its mission to reach Mars. Here is what the powerful new Raptor 3 engines and V3 upgrades mean for the future of space travel.

Question Time: Weekly News QuizQuestion Time invites readers to test how closely they followed the week's news. The quiz turns the biggest developments into a quick check of current affairs awareness.

Rs 5 crore, Rs 12 crore, Rs 40 crore? What retirement means for Indians todayRs 1 crore once sounded life-changing. Today, some Indians say even Rs 10-15 crore may not guarantee retirement comfort. I spoke to families to understand what they now consider their ideal retirement corpus and why the number keeps rising.

Live: Will KC Venugopal be next CM? Congress top brass to take final call todayKerala Govt Formation Live Updates: Days after the Kerala Assembly election results handed a decisive mandate to the Congress-led UDF, all eyes will be on today as the party is set to announce its chief ministerial face, following days of intense deliberations by the top leadership. Emerging as the X-factor in the race is powerful Congress general secretary (organisation) KC Venugopal, the Lok Sabha MP from Alappuzha, who has entered the fray despite not contesting the Assembly elections. Also in active contention are senior state Congress leaders VD Satheesan, the outgoing Leader of Opposition, and Ramesh Chennithala, a former LoP considered close to former Congress president Sonia Gandhi. Stay tuned with Indiatoday.in for all live updates.

Is it worth losing a relationship over politics?A cursory glance at social media after the election results – which saw the BJP breach the Trinamool Congress's Bengal fortress and Vijay's TVK delivering a political blockbuster in Tamil Nadu – would have offered enough examples of friendships turning bitter over ideological leanings. Bas, khatam. Tata. Bye bye.

North Korea's 'Dead Hand'? Pyongyang will fire nukes if Kim Jong-un is killedNorth Korea has revised its constitution to mandate an automatic nuclear strike if leader Kim Jong-un is assassinated or incapacitated during a hostile attack threatening the country's nuclear command system.

Rain alert: Fresh weather system to deliver duststorm, quick showerA fresh but feeble Western Disturbance is approaching northwest India, set to bring dust storms, brief rain, and thundershowers to Delhi, Punjab, Haryana, and parts of Rajasthan and UP.

Samson puts full stop to CSK captaincy noise: Don't go to new home with demandsSanju Samson has put a full stop to the chatter about him becoming the CSK captain. Samson has been a key player for Chennai since making his move from Rajasthan Royals ahead of the IPL 2026 season.

Trisha greets and hugs Vijay's mother Shoba at oath ceremonyTrisha Krishnan greeted Vijay's mother, Shoba Chandrasekhar, at his swearing-in ceremony in Chennai. The exchange stood out at an event marked by Vijay's first remarks as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister and his family's emotional presence.

Anupam Kher, Sanjay Dutt to Kajol: Celebrities share Mother's Day tributesCelebrities celebrated Mother's Day by sharing sweet photos, old memories and loving messages for their mothers on social media. Anupam Kher, Sanjay Dutt, Kajol, Sunny and Bobby Deol were among the stars who commemorated the occasion.

sports.headline: CSK star at CM Vijay's oath ceremony in Chennai? R Ashwin joins social media banter IPL 2026: A viral lookalike of CSK pacer Anshul Kamboj at CM Vijay's oath ceremony triggered a hilarious social media intervention from R Ashwin, just hours before the Super Kings' crucial afternoon clash against Lucknow.

Come on, you Irons: Guardiola hilariously asks West Ham United to hurt Arsenal Pep Guardiola appealed to West Ham after Manchester City beat Brentford 3-0 to stay in the title hunt. The City boss imitated the West Ham hammers with his hand during the post-match press conference after the Brentford win.

Watch: New dad Suryakumar gives sweets to paparazzi after birth of baby girl Suryakumar Yadav shared sweets with reporters at Mumbai airport after the birth of his daughter. He is now set to join Mumbai Indians for a must-win match against Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

Think outside the box: RR bowlers slammed by Bond after another 200-plus leak Shane Bond criticised Rajasthan Royals' bowlers after they leaked 229 in a 77-run defeat to Gujarat Titans. Bond said that the bowlers need to adapt to survive in the ultra-aggressive IPL and hasn't seen a lot of innovation from across the board.

Who is Azan Awais, first Pak batter in 17 years to hit away Test century on debut? Bangladesh vs Pakistan, 1st Test: Azan Awais scored a defiant away Test hundred on debut against Bangladesh in Dhaka. The landmark innings ended Pakistan's 17-year wait and underlined the value of strong domestic red-ball cricket.

Sooryavanshi for Test cricket? Ashwin backs crowd-favourite teenager for all formats IPL 2026: Ravichandran Ashwin has floated the idea of fast-tracking Vaibhav Sooryavanshi into India's senior side, even in Test cricket, saying the 15-year-old possesses the kind of big-hitting ability that can pull crowds to stadiums.

RCB vs MI Preview: Bengaluru seek answers in Raipur as Kohli looks to find form IPL 2026, RCB vs MI and CSK vs LSG: The IPL playoff race heats up with a blockbuster Sunday double-header as RCB face Mumbai Indians in Raipur, while Chennai Super Kings host Lucknow Super Giants at Chepauk. With qualification spots still up for grabs, every point could prove crucial in the race to the top four.

Deepika Kumari stars as Indian recurve archery team clinches World Cup gold India's women's recurve team beat China in a shoot-off to win World Cup gold in Shanghai. The comeback, driven by Deepika Kumari's leadership amid coaching uncertainty, ended India's wait for this title.

Carried Dhoni's Boost cutout: When long-haired Mahi left young Samson in awe Sanju Samson said sharing the CSK dressing room with MS Dhoni feels like living a childhood dream. Samson recalled as a kid he was starstruck by a long-haired Dhoni and shared how he carried the cutout of the CSK legend in his personal diary.

Champions, undelivered: Why Indian sport needs a Zomato momentHandcrafted ByOur Editors They design their own kits, fly unrecognised through airports, and joke about quitting for Instagram. India's best badminton players are asking a simple question. Why doesn't this country deliver for its non-cricket champions?

GT consistency better than Vaibhav Sooryavanshi destruction: Hayden's blunt takeMatthew Hayden said Gujarat Titans value batting deep over brief early destruction from Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after beating Rajasthan Royals in Jaipur. His point was simple: in 200-plus games, sustained strike-rates and structure beat a short burst of chaos.

Samson puts full stop to CSK captaincy noise: Don't go to new home with demandsSanju Samson has put a full stop to the chatter about him becoming the CSK captain. Samson has been a key player for Chennai since making his move from Rajasthan Royals ahead of the IPL 2026 season.

Still in vacation mode? Rajasthan Royals caught napping by Rashid KhanIPL 2026: Rashid Khan's four-wicket spell dismantled Rajasthan Royals after Gujarat Titans posted 229 in Jaipur. The defeat exposed RR's muddled planning and sharpened the cost of another flat display.

Is IPL hurting Jacob Bethell's career? RCB batter reacts to Cook-Pietersen debateIPL 2026, RCB vs MI: Jacob Bethell backed his decision to stay with Royal Challengers Bengaluru despite limited opportunities, insisting the IPL environment and exposure to world-class players will only help his development.

Aryna Sabalenka injured before French Open? World No.1 reveals fitness scareAryna Sabalenka revealed that a lower back and hip issue hampered her movement during her shock Italian Open defeat to Sorana Cirstea, forcing her to take a medical timeout in the deciding set.

Don't play one off Test with anyone!: Veteran SL cricketer slams likely ECB planAngelo Mathews has hit out at reports that England want one-Test tours of Sri Lanka and Bangladesh in the next WTC cycle. His response sharpens the wider argument over equality, revenue and the future shape of Test cricket.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi keeps haunting bowlers, becomes fastest to 100 T20 sixesVaibhav Sooryavanshi continued his stunning rise in T20 cricket, becoming the fastest batter to reach 100 sixes by getting there in just 514 balls during Rajasthan Royals' clash against Gujarat Titans in IPL 2026.

Vinesh Phogat refuses to bow down in front of WFI, shares cryptic tweetVinesh Phogat posted a cryptic message on social media after the Wrestling Federation of India barred her from competing at the National Open Ranking tournament. Vinesh has indicated that she will not back down against the WFI.

Vijay's oath ceremony disrupts athletics meet: Athletes told to report earlyAthletes competing at the Indian Open Athletics Series-6 in Chennai have been asked to report as early as 5 am due to traffic restrictions around C. Joseph Vijay's swearing-in ceremony on Sunday.

Gujarat Titans strengthen playoff grip as Rajasthan Royals sink furtherIPL 2026, RR vs GT: Gujarat Titans stormed into the top two after beating the Rajasthan Royals by 77 runs on Saturday at the Sawai Mansingh Stadium in Jaipur. With the defeat, the Royals also slipped out of the top four.

CSK requests fans to avoid political signage in IPL match vs LSGChennai Super Kings have urged fans to avoid bringing political banners, flags and hoardings to Chepauk ahead of their IPL 2026 clash against Lucknow Super Giants. The advisory comes amid renewed political focus around the stadium following Vijay becoming Tamil Nadu's Chief Minister.

Sabalenka suffers another upset as World No.1 struggles before French OpenItalian Open 2026: World No.1 Aryna Sabalenka suffered another major upset before the French Open, losing to Sorana Cirstea in Rome after her earlier shock defeat to Hailey Baptiste in Madrid.

11 deliveries. 17 runs. Biggest no-ball: Archer's over from hell in RR vs GTRajasthan Royals' Jofra Archer delivered perhaps his worst over in Indian Premier League this season. Playing against GT, Archer bowled 11 deliveries, conceded 17 runs in the first over of the match.

Will Hardik and Surya play must-win game against RCB? MI provides updateIPL 2026: Mumbai Indians face a must-win situation against Royal Challengers Bengaluru, needing victory in all remaining games to stay in playoff contention. With only four matches left, their qualification hopes depend not just on winning, but also on favourable results elsewhere on the points table.

Yashasvi Jaiswal makes captaincy debut vs GT, but why did Riyan Parag miss out?IPL 2026, GT vs RR: Yashasvi Jaiswal led the Rajasthan Royals in the clash against Gujarat Royals on Saturday at the Sawai Mansingh Stadium in Jaipur as Riyan Parag missed out due to a hamstring injury.

Arshdeep Singh's instagram reels under scanner amid BCCI-guidelinesIPL 2026: The BCCI has issued a fresh IPL advisory that puts player-generated social media content and team access under tighter control. The move reflects the board's concern that loose franchise protocols could undermine security and anti-corruption safeguards.

They have betrayed Real Madrid: Coach Arbeloa slams dressing room leaksReal Madrid manager Alvaro Arbeloa considers the dressing room leaks as a betrayal of the club's badge. The manager reacted to the ugly brawl inside the Real Madrid dressing room ahead of the final El Clasico this season.

Mohammad Abbas, Azan Awais lead Pakistan's fightback in Mirpur TestBAN vs PAK, 1st Test: Mohammad Abbas starred with a five-wicket haul before debutant Azan Awais struck an unbeaten 85 as Pakistan mounted a spirited fightback on Day 2 of the opening Test against Bangladesh in Mirpur.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi named RR's new rockstar as Ravindra Jadeja passes mantleRavindra Jadeja has handed Vaibhav Suryavanshi the 'Rockstar' tag once made famous by Shane Warne, praising the Rajasthan Royals youngster's maturity, composure and fearless batting.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
